events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May was born on July 19, 1947, in Hampton Hill, Middlesex, England.

angles.name: Guitar Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: The man behind some of rock's most iconic riffs, Queen's Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today! What's your favourite May solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Michael Philip Jagger, the iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, was born on July 26, 1943, in Dartford, Kent, England.

angles.name: Rock Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young today! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger, still strutting his stuff and proving rock 'n' roll truly never dies.

events.title: MTV's 45th Anniversary
events.blurb: MTV, originally an initialism of Music Television, launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast.

angles.name: MTV Changed Everything
angles.copy: It's 45 years since MTV burst onto our screens, kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' and forever changing how we consume music. Remember watching it for the first time?

events.title: Woodstock Festival's 57th Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music and Art Fair, billed as '3 Days of Peace & Music', began on August 15, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, the iconic Woodstock Festival kicked off. Three days of peace, music, and a moment that defined a generation. What's your favourite Woodstock performance?

events.title: 49th Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977, at his Graceland estate in Memphis, Tennessee.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the incomparable Elvis Presley. His music and legacy continue to shake, rattle, and roll generations.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Christine Ellen Hynde, the American-British singer, songwriter, and founding member of The Pretenders, was born on September 7, 1951, in Akron, Ohio.

angles.name: Pretenders Frontwoman's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! The voice and force behind The Pretenders, still rocking after all these years.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: William John Paul Gallagher, the English singer-songwriter and co-founder of Oasis, was born on September 21, 1972, in Manchester, England.

angles.name: Oasis Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: The one and only Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today! Forever a rock 'n' roll star. What's your favourite Oasis track?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Global James Bond Day is celebrated annually on October 5th, marking the anniversary of the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in London in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: It's James Bond Day! Celebrating over six decades of 007, from iconic gadgets to unforgettable theme tunes. What's your favourite Bond film?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Winston Ono Lennon, co-founder of The Beatles, was born on October 9, 1940, in Liverpool, England, and passed away in 1980.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary artist and peace activist, John Lennon. His message of 'Imagine' still resonates profoundly.
